mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payment_price), 0) as totalSales, IFNULL(SUM(payment_fee), 0) as totalFee, IFNULL(SUM(payment_price) - SUM(payment_fee), 0) as totalAmount FROM PAYMENT WHERE status = '결제완료'
AND payment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT u.name AS memberName, p.payment_date AS payDate, p.payment_price AS payAmount, p.payment_fee AS fee, (p.payment_price - p.payment_fee) AS netAmount, COALESCE(pa.bank_name, g.bank_name) AS bankName, COALESCE(pa.account_number, g.account_number) AS accountNum, CASE WHEN (SELECT target_type FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE id = #{settlementId}) = 'GYM' THEN g.name ELSE tu.name END AS ownerName FROM PAYMENT p JOIN USER u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN GYM g ON p.gym_id = g.id LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON p.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER tu ON t.user_id = tu.id LEFT JOIN PAYOUT_ACCOUNT pa ON t.id = pa.trainer_id WHERE p.status = '결제완료'
AND ( CASE WHEN (SELECT target_type FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE id = #{settlementId}) = 'GYM' THEN p.gym_id ELSE p.trainer_id END ) = (SELECT target_id FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE id = #{settlementId})
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.payment_date, '%Y-%m') = (SELECT settlement_month FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE id = #{settlementId})
ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE SETTLEMENT SET status = '정산완료', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PAYMENT p LEFT JOIN GYM g ON p.gym_id = g.id LEFT JOIN USER u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = '결제완료'
AND p.payment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND p.gym_id IS NOT NULL AND p.trainer_id IS NULL
AND p.trainer_id IS NOT NULL
AND (g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{salesSearch}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{salesSearch}, '%'))
